TinkatonDescription: A small pink creature with a big hammer. It will "gather" metal items for you at night.
LeadersCrestDescription: A shard of what appears to be an old blade of some sort.
SteelFeatherDescription: A steel feather from a big bird. How can it fly with this?
LeaderBladeDescription: A blade used by a great leader. It seems that wielding it brings out the best of oneself.
LeaderBladeReplicaDescription: A replica of the leader blade. Maybe it can be traded for the real thing?
GigatonHammerDescription: The signature weapon of Tinkaton. You'll have to swing your whole body around to attack with this huge hammer.
GigatonHammerReplicaDescription: A replica of the Gigaton Hammer. Maybe it can be traded for the real thing?
FeatherDaggerDescription: A small dagger made from a bird feather.
FeatherDaggerReplicaDescription: A replica of the Feather Dagger. Maybe it can be traded for the real thing?
GigatonHammerSDescription: The signature weapon of Tinkaton. It's a different color than normal, this somehow makes it more desirable?
GigatonHammerSReplicaDescription: A replica of the Gigaton Hammer=. Maybe it can be traded for the real thing?
